forbid.message: Use <Anchor> from the design system instead of <a>.
Use <Button> from the design system instead of <button>.
Use <Checkbox> from the design system instead of <input>.
Use <List> from the design system instead of <ul>.
Use <Modal> from the design system instead of <dialog>.
Use <Select> from the design system instead of <select>.
Use <Slider> from the design system instead of <input>.
Use <Table> from the design system instead of <table>.
Use <TextArea> from the design system instead of <textarea>.
Use <TextInput> from the design system instead of <input>.

patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().

no-restricted-syntax.selector: Literal[value=/font-family\s*:\s*(?!['\"]?(?:NVIDIA Sans|JetBrains Mono|NVIDIA Sans Fallback|JetBrains Mono Fallback|missing-ligature-font))/i]
no-restricted-syntax.message: Font not provided by the design system. Available: NVIDIA Sans, JetBrains Mono, NVIDIA Sans Fallback, JetBrains Mono Fallback, missing-ligature-font.
